content: Chris H. (GPU Ventures/Notmo) discussed in his “Memos to the President” podcast, hosted by Washington AI think‑tank SCSP, the growing negative public perception of AI and the industry’s possible stigmatization. The host asked whether the sector is being unfairly criticized. H. responded sharply, demanding attention to what he sees as panic‑mongering and questioning how the current CEO of Anthropic came to lead the company. His remarks were forceful and critical.

title: 大学毕业生可以回炉技校，那大学老师呢？ | 原文
content: Recent reports show that many university graduates are returning to technical schools, a trend spurred by policies urging institutions to offer specialized “university‑to‑technician” programs. Beijing plans six full‑time classes and 21 skills‑training courses, mixing short‑ and long‑term, contract‑based training to create new employment paths. Over half of respondents (52.2 %) say recertification boosts job prospects, citing high market demand for skills, while 43.2 % value multiple skill options and 33.2 % see it as a way to gain social experience.

title: 市场看似疯狂，实则有其规律
content: The article discusses how what appears to be chaos in financial markets actually follows identifiable patterns. It argues that amid seemingly irrational price movements, underlying forces such as supply‑demand dynamics, investor behavior, and macroeconomic factors still drive market behavior. Recognizing these patterns can help investors make better decisions, indicating that market “madness” is not random but ultimately rule‑governed.

title: Group averages obscure how an individual's brain controls behavior: study
content: The study demonstrates that relying on group average data can hide individual variations in how brain activity governs behavior, indicating that personalized neuroimaging is essential for understanding behavioral control.

title: Thoth – open-source Local-first AI Assistant
content: Thoth is an open‑source AI assistant that runs locally on a user’s device, prioritizing privacy and first‑party control over cloud-based solutions. It offers local‑first artificial intelligence capabilities while remaining freely available for community development and contribution.

title: 求助个人订阅 gpt pro 最安全的方法
content: The post seeks a secure, official way for a company project to subscribe to GPT‑Pro. It proposes creating a new Apple US account with a Hong‑Kong HSBC debit card, setting up a Singapore‑based AWS VPS as a global proxy, and using the proxy to purchase the GPT‑Pro subscription. The VPS would also host API distribution servers for internal team use. The author asks whether this plan is viable or if a similar setup using a Vietnamese office computer would be safer and more stable.

title: 针对树木的指控
content: The Economist examines growing arguments that protecting trees may worsen climate change.  It notes that forest regrowth can release significant amounts of carbon and may alter local biodiversity.  The piece argues that unrestricted logging of threatened forests can sometimes be more beneficial than short‑term preservation, though it stresses that the debate is complex and depends on species, region, and policy choices.

title: 2026年伯克希尔·哈撒韦股东大会——沃伦·巴菲特专访
content: Warren Buffett, 95, stepped back from the 2026 Berkshire Hathaway shareholders’ meeting, handing the spotlight to new CEO Greg Abel. Buffett reflected on a market increasingly driven by “gambling” and the rarity of attractive investment opportunities, emphasizing patience and deep industry understanding. He praised Abel’s leadership and reiterated core holdings such as Apple, American Express, and Coca‑Cola, while highlighting the company’s robust cash position and evolving governance structure. The session also touched on AI risks and U.S. economic stability.

title: 那些骗你点错的各种「月付」们，终于要被制裁了 | 原文
content: The article discusses how consumers are unintentionally enrolled in monthly payment plans (“月付”) on Chinese e‑commerce and live‑stream platforms, often due to misleading options. Examples include small purchases that trigger installment orders and hidden fees for items as low as a few yuan. The piece criticizes the aggressive credit‑busting tactics and notes that regulators are finally moving to sanction these deceptive practices.

title: 忙到停不下来的脑子，怎么可能有创造力？ | 原文
content: The article argues that constant busyness—measured by endless tutoring, work overtime, and social obligations—sterilizes children’s creativity, even though parents often blame only education systems. It notes that even great thinkers have found inspiration during mundane activities, suggesting that frequent, stifling busyness hinders innovation. The piece urges reconsidering how we value and structure daily routines to preserve creative potential.

title: CTO不香了？百亿公司高管们为何集体转身，去Anthropic当工程师
content: In 2025–26, several high‑profile CTOs from multi‑billion‑dollar firms—including Workday, You.com, Instagram, Box, Super.com, and Adept AI—have resigned to join Anthropic as individual contributors.  According to the founder of Super.com, these moves stem from a desire to influence AGI research directly rather than manage large teams.  Commentators argue the shift reflects a new metric of power: proximity to advanced models, not managerial scale.  The trend signals a redefinition of career peaks in the AI era.

Berkshire Hathaway’s 2026 shareholder meeting, the first test after Buffett’s handover to Abell, highlighted key decisions. Abell emphasized patient capital deployment, avoiding sub‑optimal opportunities even with record cash of $397 billion. The portfolio centers on Apple, American Express, Moody’s, and Coca‑Cola, with tech stocks considered only if business models and valuations are clear. Decentralized structure remains, but headquarters will enforce accountability and may divest underperforming units. Abell rejects short‑term AI pricing roles but sees AI improving operational efficiency and utility growth.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: AI 大模型的「中文税」：中文比英文更费 Token，为什么？
content: The article explains why Chinese text costs more tokens—and therefore money—when using large language models. It shows that Claude and GPT tokenizers, built mainly on English data, split Chinese characters into many tokens, while Chinese‑first models like Qwen and DeepSeek use full‑character or word tokens, reducing costs. The author also finds that archaic Chinese uses even fewer tokens due to its concise characters, though this may raise inference difficulty. Historical parallels between Chinese input methods and modern tokenizers highlight inherent design trade‑offs.

title: 越南“中国化”比云南和海南更早、更彻底，为何却脱离了中国？ | 原文
content: Vietnam was incorporated into Chinese imperial administration earlier and more fully than Yunnan or Hainan. It was annexed as Xiàng County during the Qin dynasty and remained under Chinese influence for centuries, unlike Hainan, which was abandoned after the Han and restored only in the Tang–Song period, and Yunnan, which was largely outside central control until the Yuan–Ming era. Despite this deep “Sinification,” Vietnam eventually separated from China, whereas Yunnan and Hainan remained within the Chinese sphere.

title: 35 岁男子收到岗位被 AI 取代通知，拒绝大幅降薪后被单位开除，法院判处公司支付赔偿金，怎样解读？
content: A 35‑year‑old employee, Zhou, worked as a question‑check reviewer at a tech company. In 2025 the company claimed AI would replace his role and offered him a transfer with a 40 % pay cut (¥15,000 from ¥25,000). Zhou rejected the offer, after which the company terminated his contract. Arbitration awarded him over ¥260,000 in unlawful‑termination compensation. The court upheld this decision, ruling that the company’s use of AI as a reason for termination was not a legitimate business justification and that the pay cut was an unfair proposal.

TikTok’s global MAU tops 2 billion, with TEMU and SHEIN following. Thai e‑commerce market exceeds 1 trillion baht, dominated by Shopee, TikTok Shop, and Lazada. Кр‑Asia and 36KR offer English media and out‑of‑home learning communities for Chinese firms.

title: 假期出游，我被AI坑惨了
content: During May Day, travelers increasingly used AI to plan trips, but six real‑life stories show the pitfalls. AI generates polished itineraries, yet often omits real‑time details: wrong road lengths, closed attractions, inaccurate bus schedules, misleading attraction descriptions, dangerous routes, and unsuitable restaurants. While AI can outline a rough route, users must verify transport times, opening hours, local nuances, and safety risks before relying on it for travel.

title: 硅谷大厂的AI“含金量”开始分级
content: Silicon Valley’s top five tech giants have shown strong Q1 results but varying stock reactions. Google’s cloud revenue surged, and its operating margin nearly doubled thanks to in‑house TPUs, proving AI can raise profitability. Amazon’s AWS hit its fastest growth in 15 quarters, driven by custom chips and AI services, while Microsoft’s Azure and AI subsystems also outpaced expectations. Meta posted solid revenue and ad gains, yet shares fell as cap‑ex guidance rose. Apple remains the only major firm without large AI data‑center spending, focusing on device‑side AI instead. The report highlights that investors now demand measurable returns on AI investments, with Google’s margin gains as a benchmark. In China, firms like Alibaba and Tencent are ramping AI capital expenditures, but analysts stress the importance of profit‑margin improvements, chip self‑sufficiency, and sustainable consumer retention in evaluating AI commercialization.

title: 马斯克：大多数加密货币都是骗局
content: Elon Musk testified that most cryptocurrencies are “scams,” noting that while some have legitimate value, the majority lack substance. He made this remark during a courtroom explanation for OpenAI’s 2018 consideration of an ICO. Musk’s views on crypto have been mixed, having invested heavily in Bitcoin and praised Dogecoin, yet he cautions against treating such assets like gambling. He is also suing OpenAI for $150 billion over alleged mission betrayal.

The piece encourages individuals to broaden their perspective through reading and the internet rather than relying on local prejudice. It stresses personal responsibility, learning from experience, and understanding human nature’s constancy.

title: 《大西洋月刊》丨我在杰夫·贝索斯私人聚会上学到的关于亿万富翁的事 | 原文
content: The article recounts the author's experience at a private retreat hosted by Jeff Bezos and the observations he made about billionaires. It explores how wealth can make everything seem trivial and examines attitudes toward money, success, and privilege from the perspective of a wealthy host. The piece reflects on the contrast between the billionaire lifestyle and everyday concerns, offering insights into the mindset of those at the top of the economic ladder.

title: 普通的你，也会是别人的天才女友 | 原文
content: The article reflects on the idea that an ordinary person can be seen as a “genius girlfriend” by others. It examines how the term, popularized by a novel and TV series, highlights the special qualities within female friendships. The piece questions what traits earn the label of genius, whether such brilliance can also hurt, and if it can fade into normalcy. Ultimately, it explores how ordinary people may become admired friends and how friendships evolve over time.

title: 【读书】【硬件篇】IBM百年史：企业服务巨头如何跨越周期？(2) | 原文
content: IBM shifted focus to financial engineering and consulting under Gerstner, establishing a long‑term growth foundation. After Gerstner’s 2002 retirement, Palmisano took over, emphasizing software services. IBM launched two five‑year plans—Roadmap 2010 and Roadmap 2015—centered on EPS growth, with the 2005 plan targeting 2010. This period marked IBM’s transition into a business‑service‑oriented model, defining its strategy for the next two decades.

title: 【读书】【硬件篇】IBM百年史：企业服务巨头如何跨越周期？(1) | 原文
content: IBM, founded in 1911, has survived over a century in the rapidly changing tech industry. The article reviews IBM’s history of dominating calculators and mainframes, its missed opportunities in the PC era, and how it has navigated continuous industry shifts. It examines IBM’s strategic decisions, corporate culture, and leadership approaches that enabled the company to adapt, thrive, and maintain relevance across multiple technological cycles.

title: Maryland Is First to Ban A.I.-Driven Price Increases in Grocery Stores
content: Maryland has become the first U.S. state to prohibit grocery stores from automatically raising prices using artificial intelligence. The law requires that any price changes must be manually authorized, preventing automated, dynamic pricing systems from increasing costs without customer or regulator oversight.

title: A more efficient implementation of Shor's algorithm

title: 沃什 “降息 + 缩表”组合政策对于股市流动性的影响
content: The article discusses how a potential Fed “rate cut + quantitative tightening” (QT) policy, likely under new Chair “Wash”, could affect stock liquidity. A rate cut lowers discount rates and supports equity valuation, while QT removes monetary base, tightening risk appetite. The net effect depends on the balance between the two. Conventional models suggest stocks and gold benefit, while industrial metals like copper face greater uncertainty. It outlines three scenarios—mild, standard, and aggressive—highlighting potential market moves of ±10% and sector‑specific impacts.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 趋势de朋友

They conclude with good‑luck wishes, noting they use AGENTS‑PYTHON and CI/CD.

The game, played at the 76ers’ home arena, featured strong offensive performances from Philadelphia, highlighted by key scoring runs that kept Boston off balance. The win gave Philadelphia a series advantage. Meanwhile, the Celtics struggled to contain the Sixers’ depth, resulting in a decisive victory that shifted momentum in the series.

title: 董宝珍：五粮液财报回溯没有合法依据
content: Wuliangye recently revised its 2025 Q1–Q3 financials, cutting revenue from 60.945 bn to 30.638 bn and net profit from 21.511 bn to 6.475 bn, citing a “wrong accounting treatment.” The company argued that revenue should only recognize when distributors sell to end consumers, not when goods are shipped and paid for. Critics note this departs from standard Chinese practice, where control transfers upon shipment, making the adjustment legally and logically unsupported. Regulators may need to investigate.

title: 宇文所安：“我是大学这个机构的仆役” | 原文
content: Stephen Owen, a celebrated Chinese classical literature scholar and Harvard professor, died on May 1 2026 in Cambridge, Massachusetts. In a recent interview, he reflected on his teaching passion, close reading techniques, and translation objectives. He noted that texts absorbed into the literary tradition elicit a desire to assign authors, and he strives to preserve period, style, and authorial voice in each translation. Owen described himself as a skilled rewriter and a historically trained deconstructivist. The piece was published in *Wenhui Scholar* (Dec 28, 2018).

title: A Couple Million Lines of Haskell: Production Engineering at Mercury
content: The article discusses how Mercury, a large-scale project, applies production engineering practices to a codebase consisting of several million lines written in Haskell. It examines the challenges of maintaining such a vast Haskell codebase, the strategies used to ensure reliability, performance, and developer productivity, and the specific tools and processes implemented to support continuous integration, testing, and deployment.

title: 神经科学揭秘：睡眠不足时，你的大脑究竟在经历什么
content: Recent research shows that once a person is sleep-deprived, the brain’s internal cleansing processes—normally carried out during sleep—forcefully intrude during wakefulness. Experiments with 26 participants revealed that after a full night’s rest, response times were quick and brain activity normal. After a full night awake, participants exhibited slower reactions, missed signals, and simultaneous decreases in pupil dilation, breathing, heart rate, and a shift in EEG patterns exactly at moments of brief distraction. These findings suggest that inadequate sleep switches the brain into a “sleep mode” that sacrifices attention to complete necessary maintenance, impacting safety and performance.

title: 被点名批评的5A景区，终于吃到了点苦头
content: The Chinese tourism ministry recently criticized several well‑known 5A attractions—such as Shaolin Temple and Lijiang—for issues like high prices, heavy crowds, poor service, and excessive ticket add‑ons. 5A status, once a mark of quality, has expanded rapidly, diluting its value and creating a gap between expectation and experience.  Travelers now favor immersive, low‑cost “slow‑tour” experiences over costly, commodified sites.  Some 5A parks show improvement by cutting admission and enhancing service, but many still rely on fee‑heavy models, risking future popularity.

title: 如何评价吴宜泽 17:16 战胜艾伦挺进斯诺克世锦赛决赛？
content: Chinese snooker player Wu Yize won a dramatic 17‑16 victory over Mark Allen in the quarter‑finals of the 2026 World Championship, defeating Allen after trailing 14‑16 by winning the final three frames. Wu’s win secures his place in the final against Shaun Murphy, marking the second consecutive year a Chinese player reached the final. He also becomes the first snooker World Championship finalist born after 2000.

title: 谷歌将为 Gemini 投放广告，目前处于准备阶段
content: Google’s parent company, Alphabet, announced during its earnings call that ads may soon be added to the Gemini AI platform. CEO Philipp Schindler said advertising would help scale the product to billions of users and provide useful business information if implemented well. Google is still preparing and will not rush the rollout; it will reveal plans when ready and may introduce ads on Gemini’s mobile app if testing proves successful. Earlier rumors suggested an ad launch by 2026.

title: 库克卸任前寄语：建议新 CEO 把时间花在对的地方
content: Tim Cook, before stepping down, advised new Apple CEO John Tanasa to focus his time on the right priorities: building the best products and enhancing people’s lives. Cook praised Tanasa’s commitment to continue the firm’s financial discipline and strategic continuity, while hinting that the company has an impressive product roadmap—details of which remain undisclosed.

title: 推荐一个 GPU 推理速度计算器, 可能方便买配件自建本地大模型的人用上
content: The material recommends a GPU inference speed calculator aimed at individuals who build local large language model setups, suggesting it can help users choose components more effectively.

title: 生活上找对人，事业上跟对人，投资上看对人。对一个，保底。错一个，遗憾。全对，阳光灿烂。全错，生不如死
content:
1 优秀的企业和投资人具有同样的特征，那就是不断的进步，拉开与竞争对手在能力上的距离。以5年的时间看企业，原本差不多的格局中优秀者脱颖而出一骑绝尘。以5年的时间看人，本来差不多的水平中优秀者连上几个台阶，知识素养的k线走势完全呈现大牛股特征。

长期来看股市中的投资收益取决于综合能力…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: Modern C++ Programming: Busato
content: "Modern C++ Programming: A Practical Guide by Stéphan Busato teaches how to write maintainable, high‑performance code in C++17 and C++20. It covers language features such as range‑based loops, smart pointers, and templates, and explains modern best practices for resource management, concurrency, and performance optimization. The book includes practical examples, clear explanations, and tips for applying C++ in real‑world projects."

title: 格雷格·阿贝尔在巴菲特之后致伯克希尔股东的信：请保持耐心
content: Greg Abel’s letter to Berkshire Hathaway shareholders follows Warren Buffett’s departure, urging shareholders to remain patient. He acknowledges concerns over the company’s future direction and the challenges of upholding Buffett’s legacy. Abel stresses the importance of prudent investment decisions, steady management practices, and long‑term thinking to continue Berkshire’s successful track record. The message aims to reassure investors that the company will maintain disciplined value investing and thoughtful capital allocation while navigating post‑Buffett changes.

title: 未曾设想自己会买一把一万的椅子
content: The author experienced back pain after switching to a HERMAN MILLER Aeron chair at a company move. Diagnosed with mild lumbar protrusion and spending long hours at home, they sought ergonomic chairs, raising their budget. After being disappointed with several options, they found the Steelcase Karman with a headrest at a specialty showroom. Its simple design fit them well, providing comfort and support, so they bought it, despite it costing about 10,000.

title: 随着特朗普扩大对古巴的制裁，古巴仅存的经济命脉岌岌可危
content: Trump’s escalation of U.S. sanctions against Cuba is threatening the country’s limited economic lifelines, tightening financial and trade constraints that Cuba already faces. The expanded restrictions further isolate Cuba from international markets and reduce its ability to import goods and services, heightening the risk of economic instability. This move jeopardizes the few avenues Cuba relies on for commerce and foreign exchange.

title: 目前可托管到 Cloudflare 公开注册的免费二级域名， Stackryze， DigitalPlat， DNSHE
content: Stackryze offers free secondary domains (e.g., domain.stackryze.com) with a .indevs.in suffix, registered via a GitHub account (one free domain per account) and valid for one year. DigitalPlat provides domains under .dpdns.org, .us.kg, .qzz.io, or .xx.kg (some requiring sponsorship), also via GitHub and email, with annual renewal. DNSHE www.dnshe.com supplies .ccwu.cc domains registered by email, claiming up to ten years; its former .cd, .ci, and .net domains are no longer available. These domains are best used for testing; production sites should use paid options such as 6‑8 digit .xyz or .best domains.
